instructions: Close the flaps of the box.
Use both hands to fold the box lid shut.
Shut the open flaps on the packing box.
Close both lids of the packaging box using your grippers.
Fold down the box flaps to seal it closed.
Push both flaps of the box down to close it.
Use your left and right grippers to shut the box flaps.
Seal the packing box by closing its two open flaps.
Grasp each flap and press it shut to close the box.
Close the packaging box by folding both flaps inward.
